title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 in predicting protein structures and has applications in drug toxicity prediction, cell labeling, cancer drug discovery, and antibody generation.
